Skills.Name: Short Blades
Skills.Description: Mastery of daggers, spears, and pointed thrust-class weapons — quick, disorienting strikes.

Powers.Name: Jab
Powers.Description: Piercing-class hits have a substantial chance to apply Confused with longer duration than the universal class hook.

Powers.Name: Bloodletter
Powers.Description: Frequent light Bleed proc on every Piercing hit. Light dice but stacks aggressively with longer-blade Bleeds.

Powers.Name: Expertise
Powers.Description: +1 to-hit while wielding a Piercing-class weapon (Dagger / Spear / ChoirSpine).

Powers.Name: Hobble
Powers.Description: Piercing hits have a chance to apply Hobbled — the target is harder to hit while limping.

Powers.Name: Rejoinder
Powers.Description: When an enemy attack misses you and you have a Piercing weapon equipped, you have a chance to immediately counter-attack.

Powers.Name: Puncture
Powers.Description: +2 penetration on every melee swing made with a Piercing weapon. Slips past armor that would otherwise stop the blade.

Powers.Name: Shank
Powers.Description: Active ability: a vicious melee strike against a status-ridden adjacent foe. +2 penetration per negative status effect they suffer (Bleeding, Stunned, Confused, etc.). 10-turn cooldown. Requires a Piercing weapon equipped.

Powers.Name: Flurry
Powers.Description: Active ability: 3 quick weapon strikes against one adjacent foe in a single turn. Each strike rolls hit + damage + on-hit procs independently — Bloodletter / Jab / Hobble can stack 3 times from one Flurry. 35-turn cooldown. Requires a Piercing weapon equipped.

Powers.Name: Backstab
Powers.Description: Active ability: strike an adjacent target. If a creature stands directly opposite you (target is flanked), the strike deals +100% bonus damage. 20-turn cooldown. Requires a Piercing weapon equipped.

Powers.Name: Disengage
Powers.Description: Active ability: move up to 3 cells in a chosen direction without attacking. Stops at the first solid cell or creature. 25-turn cooldown. Requires a Piercing weapon equipped.
